Our Story

About Unique White Marble

12+
Years of Craft

We are Unique White Marble And Art — a premium marble handicraft studio based in Makrana, Rajasthan, the marble capital of India.

For over 12 years, we have been crafting exquisite white marble mandirs, water fountains and decorative art pieces. Every piece is hand-crafted by skilled artisans using the finest Makrana marble — the same marble used in the Taj Mahal.

We believe every home deserves a sacred space of beauty. That's why we craft every mandir with devotion, precision and love.

🪨
Makrana Marble
Same marble as Taj Mahal — purest white quality
✋
100% Handmade
Every piece crafted by master artisans
🎨
Custom Design
Your vision, our craftsmanship
🚚
Pan India Delivery
Safe delivery to your doorstep
